attributes.title: [CockroachDB OTel] SQL & Transactions
attributes.description: SQL statement rates, transaction throughput, errors, and contention. Monitor SELECT/INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE rates, connection counts, failures, aborts, and deadlocks.

This dashboard monitors SQL workload health:
- Statement rates by type (SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE)
- Transaction throughput (BEGIN, COMMIT, ABORT)
- Connection counts and failures
- Error rates and contention
- Transaction restarts and deadlocks
